ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype associated with the comparison */,
  "base_group" TEXT /* Base group(s) in the comparison */,
  "test_group" TEXT /* Test group(s) in the comparison */,
  "filtered_by" TEXT /* Filter used for the comparison (e.g., V2) */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., in vitro, in vivo) */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Experimental design (e.g., paired, unpaired) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the comparison */,
  "replicates" INTEGER /* Number of replicates for each sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the pathway term (e.g., KEGG:01522) */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the pathway (e.g., keg, BP) */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway (e.g., Endocrine resistance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pathway */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the pathway (e.g., metabolic, signaling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway the annotation belongs to */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the pathway term (e.g., KEGG:01522) */,
  "intersection" TEXT /* Intersection of genes and pathways (e.g., IGF1,ESR1,PIK3CA,CDKN2C) */,
  "gene_count" INTEGER /* Number of genes in the intersection */,
  "entrez_ids" TEXT /* Entrez IDs of the genes in the intersection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_annotations_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_pathway_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the result belongs to */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway the result belongs to */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the pathway in the comparison (e.g., decrease) */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value of the pathway in the comparison */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted p-value for multiple testing */,
  "fdr" REAL /* False discovery rate (FDR) for the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_pathway_results_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_pathway_results_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "entrez_id" INTEGER /* Entrez ID of the gene */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_gene_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway the association belongs to */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the association belongs to */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_gene_associations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_gene_associations_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES comparison_pathway_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the setting belongs to */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway the setting belongs to */,
  "filter" TEXT /* Filter used for the analysis (e.g., V2) */,
  "cutoff" REAL /* Cutoff value for the analysis (e.g., 0.05) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis (e.g., hypergeometric test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_settings_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_settings_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression measurement */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the expression belongs to */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the expression belongs to */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "fold_change" REAL /* Fold change of the gene expression */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value of the gene expression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_curation" (
  "curation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curation event */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway being curated */,
  "curator" TEXT /* Name of the curator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the curation event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the curation event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_curation_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)
